name: 600 MG Pirfenidone Tablets
about: 600 MG Pirfenidone Tablets are a general medicine used to treat idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF). These tablets are manufactured in India and come in a pack of 2x15 tablets. The recommended dosage of 600mg should be taken as per the doctors suggestion. The tablets come in a physical form and should be stored in a dry and cool place.
